title: Motichoor Ladoo

ingredients.title: For the Boondi
items: Water: ¾ cup (adjust for smooth batter)
Baking soda: ⅛ tsp (optional, for fluffier boondi)

ingredients.title: For the Sugar Syrup
items: Saffron strands: 8–10 strands, soaked in 1 tbsp warm milk

instruction.title: Prepare the Batter
steps: Sift the besan to remove lumps.
Mix with water gradually to form a smooth, flowing batter, slightly thinner than pancake batter.
Add a pinch of baking soda (optional). Rest for 10–15 minutes.

instruction.title: Fry the Boondi
steps: Heat ghee or oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Use a boondi ladle or perforated spoon. Pour batter through it into hot ghee in a circular motion to form tiny droplets.
Fry until the boondi is just cooked but pale golden. Over-frying will make it hard.
Remove and drain on paper towels.

instruction.title: Make the Sugar Syrup
steps: In a saucepan, combine sugar and water. Boil until it reaches one-string consistency.
Test: Take a drop between your thumb and index finger; it should form a single thread.
Add cardamom powder, saffron-infused milk, and rose water. Mix well.

instruction.title: Combine Boondi and Syrup
steps: Add warm boondi to the syrup and mix gently.
Let it absorb syrup for 10–15 minutes, then check consistency.
The mixture should be sticky but not runny—ready to shape.

instruction.title: Shape the Ladoos
steps: Grease your palms lightly with ghee.
Take small portions and roll into smooth, round balls.

instruction.title: Rest
steps: Allow ladoos to set at room temperature for 1–2 hours. This helps them hold shape and develop flavor.

chefTips: Batter texture: The thinner the batter, the smaller the boondi; smaller boondi gives a soft, delicate ladoo.
Frying: Keep oil at medium heat; too hot = crispy boondi, too low = greasy boondi.
Sugar syrup: One-string consistency is crucial; too thick = hard ladoos, too thin = soggy.
Syrup absorption: Add boondi to warm syrup, not hot, for even soaking.
Storage: Store at room temperature in an airtight container for up to 7 days.
